title: Glass and Oven Cleaning Tool Non Scratch with 8 Spare Replacement, Easily Removes Stubborn Stains from Ceramic Ovens, Labels, Wallpaper, Mirror Stickers, Paint, Floors
features: Package Includes: Non-scratch cleaning tool with 1 dual-head scraper, 6 metal spare parts and 2 plastic parts, suitable for various surfaces
Applicable Scenarios: Multi-functional cleaning products for removing renovation residues, wall dust, small wall advertisements, chewing gum, etc
Easy Off Oven Cleaner: With ergonomic grip design, comfortable rubberised handle, simple to use and easy to change spare parts
Easy To Change: Push the button to the top of position , push out the spare parts and push in the new one
Why Choose Us: Safely clean delicate surfaces like glass and windows with the induction hob cleaner. Choose This Cooker Cleaning Utensils for say goodbye to stubborn stains
description: Product description Glass Oven Ceramic Hob Cleaning Tool Features: 1. No Scratch: Efficiently removes grease, burnt residue, accidental paint splatters on windows, and stubborn glue without leaving traces to scratch delicate kitchen cookware 2. Usage scenarios: stubborn stains on ceramic cookware (oven windows, induction cooker, frying pan base, deep fryer), decal stickers on glass windows, floor stains after renovation, super sticky dirt on any ceramic, adhesive labels, car film, floor glue residue Specification: Material: ABS+TPR, stainless steel Color: orange Size: 12*5*1cm Weight: 90g Package: 1 x Original Cleaning Tool 6 x Replacement Metal Parts 2 x Replacement Plastic Parts PLEASE NOTE: 1.Reattach the case after use and keep it closed. 2.Please choose the appropriate cleaning tool according to different cleaning surfaces, and replace the plastic cleaning tool for the surface that is easy to scratch and leave marks. Ingredients plastics Safety Warning Please keep out of reach of children. See more
